text: E52 Physical and Logical Resources @ s © s ¢ CloudFormation Template - YAML or JSON e .. contains logical resources - the "WHAT” * Templates are used to create Stacks e .. 1 stack, 100 stacks, 20.. stacks in each region e .. stacks create physical resources from the logical ¢ If a stacks template is changed - physical resources are changed e If a stack is deleted, normally, the physical resources are deleted
